PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for the Petitioner.

There being no objections, the Court granted the petition. Ms. Mayo will submit the proposed order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
